en: If your company is required to comply with Honduran Social Security requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Honduras Social Security IHSS Applicability Assessment
Is your company required to comply with Honduran Social Security requirements as regulated by Honduran Social Security Institute (IHSS) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Honduran legislation.
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Honduran Social Security requirements.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company does not have any employees in Honduras.
